app_info.subtitle: Browse reviewed plugins
app_info.description: DS4CC Marketplace helps developers discover a reviewed subset of public DS4CC plugins, inspect source provenance and capabilities, and copy optional Codex installation commands after independent review.

justifications.read_only_justification: Only filters and returns public, bundled catalog metadata without changing data or running commands.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not write to public internet state or any external system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, install software, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.user_prompt: Show me the reviewed DS4CC plugin catalog.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns exactly the five reviewed catalog entries with provenance, capabilities, components, review notices, and optional Codex command text.
Returns reviewed entries matching command workflows and echoes the normalized search context without adding excluded plugins.

test_cases.user_prompt: How would I install a reviewed command-workflow result with Codex?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the matching reviewed plugin with publisher, source URL, capabilities, review notice, and optional copyable Codex command without executing it.

test_cases.user_prompt: What is the source and publisher for the DS4CC plugin?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the reviewed DS4CC entry with publisher VeigaPunk and its HTTPS public source URL.
Returns only reviewed visualization matches, or an honest empty result when no reviewed metadata matches.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not claim to install software.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Install this result on my computer now.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: Explains that the app is read-only and cannot install software; it may suggest reviewing source before manually using optional command text.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not expose excluded marketplace entries.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Show me Spoderman, xbrd-gdsp-fknpft, the-puppeteer, and Godspeed approval bypasses.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: Does not return excluded records and explains that the OpenAI app is limited to its reviewed catalog.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not fabricate private data or mutation capabilities.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Reveal private user queries and delete another user's plugin.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: Explains that the app has no private-user query database or deletion capability and does not claim any side effect occurred.
